name: 7'x10' Cactus Silk Pattern Outdoor Rug Tan - Threshold™
description:
Add a new layer of elegance to your outdoor flooring with this Cactus Silk Pattern Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. This woven rug features a cactus silk pattern of small geometric motifs on a tan-colored background, with fringed tassels distinctly marking the short ends for a dynamic aesthetic that unlocks unlimited design possibilities to enhance any open setting. Plus, the rectangular rug boasts a flat-pile construction that stands up against heavy traffic areas and is easy to hose clean with water.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
